---
title: "About StatPan"
---

## About

StatPan is a data platform company focused on building tools that transform
raw, unstructured information into clean, structured data for research and insights.

### Our Mission

We believe that access to well-structured data is the foundation of meaningful
research and impactful insights. Our mission is to eliminate the friction between
raw data and actionable knowledge.

### What We Build

- **Leginote** — Knowledge management for researchers
- **AssemblyMCP** — AI agent orchestration via MCP
- **ragpan** — RAG toolkit for grounded AI applications

### Contact

- GitHub: [StatPan](https://github.com/StatPan)
- Email: hello@statpan.com
